name: OmniKit Intelligence
description: Unified AI generation platform - video, image, speech, music, and 3D model generation across multiple providers (OpenAI Sora, Google Veo, Kling, DALL-E, Gemini, ElevenLabs TTS, Tripo, Meshy) with voice library, job tracking and model catalog

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Api Key
credential_fields.description: Your OmniKit API key (starts with 'okt_'). The project is determined automatically from the key.

tools.name: generate_video
tools.description: Generate videos with AI: OpenAI Sora (up to 90s, 4K), Google Veo (up to 8s, 1080p), or Fal AI models like Kling, Luma, MiniMax, Hunyuan, Mochi. Supports text-to-video and image-to-video.

prompt.description: Description of the video to generate (max 500 chars)

provider.description: AI provider: openai (Sora), google (Veo), or fal (Kling, Luma)

model.description: Model: sora-2, sora-2-pro (OpenAI), veo-3.1, veo-3.0, veo-2.0 (Google), kling-2.6-pro, kling-o1, luma-dream-machine, minimax-hailuo (Fal)

duration.description: Video duration in seconds (1-20 for sora-2, 1-90 for sora-2-pro)

aspectRatio.description: Aspect ratio: portrait, landscape, square (OpenAI) or 16:9, 9:16 (Google)

n.description: Number of video variations (1-4, OpenAI only)

style.description: Video style: cinematic, documentary, animation (OpenAI only)

negativePrompt.description: What NOT to include (Google Veo only)

inputImageUrl.description: URL to reference image for image-to-video generation

sync.description: Wait for completion and return result (default: true). Set false only for async/webhook mode.

storeResult.description: Store generated video to files table (default: true)

tools.name: generate_image
tools.description: Generate or edit images with AI. Provider is auto-detected from the model name (gemini-* → google, dall-e-*/gpt-image-* → openai), so you can just pass a model. For image editing or reference images, pass the 'images' array — supported by Google Gemini (gemini-2.5-flash-image, gemini-3-pro-image-preview) AND OpenAI gpt-image-1 / gpt-image-1.5 / gpt-image-2 (up to 16 reference images, optional 'mask' for inpainting). DALL-E 3 does NOT support reference images — use gpt-image-2 for OpenAI editing.

prompt.description: Description of the image to generate or edit instruction

provider.description: Optional. AI provider. Auto-detected from the model name if omitted (gemini-* → google, dall-e-*/gpt-image-* → openai). Defaults to openai if neither provider nor model is set.

model.description: Optional model ID. Options: 'dall-e-3' (OpenAI, text-only), 'gpt-image-1' / 'gpt-image-1.5' / 'gpt-image-2' (OpenAI, supports reference images + editing + masks; gpt-image-2 is the highest quality), 'gemini-2.5-flash-image' (Google, fast), 'gemini-3-pro-image-preview' (Google, supports reference images + editing). If omitted, a default model for the provider is auto-selected from the catalog.

images.description: Reference images for generation OR images to edit. Use for: (1) character/style consistency - pass a reference photo to maintain appearance, (2) image editing - pass an image to modify based on prompt. Works with: Gemini (gemini-2.5-flash-image, gemini-3-pro-image-preview, max 14) and OpenAI gpt-image-* (up to 16). Will error on dall-e-3.

url.description: HTTPS URL of the image (will be fetched and base64-encoded server-side). Supported types: image/png, image/jpeg, image/webp, image/gif.

data.description: Base64-encoded image data. Alternative to url — provide one or the other.

mimeType.description: MIME type when using 'data' (e.g. image/png, image/jpeg). Defaults to image/png.

mask.description: Optional PNG mask for inpainting (OpenAI gpt-image-* only). Same dimensions as the first input image. Transparent regions = areas to be edited.

url.description: HTTPS URL of the mask PNG.

size.description: Image dimensions. dall-e-3: 1024x1024, 1024x1792, 1792x1024. gpt-image-* (incl. gpt-image-2): 1024x1024, 1024x1536, 1536x1024, auto. Ignored for Google models.

aspectRatio.description: Aspect ratio - ONLY for gemini models (Google). Values: 1:1, 9:16, 16:9, 3:4, 4:3. Ignored for OpenAI models.

resolution.description: DO NOT USE with 'images' parameter - causes errors. Only for text-to-image with gemini-3-pro-image-preview. Values: 1K, 2K, 4K. For image editing, use 'quality' instead.

quality.description: Quality tier. dall-e-3: standard | hd. gpt-image-*: low | medium | high | auto. Google: low | medium | high. For reference-image editing, prefer 'high'.

sync.description: Wait for completion and return result (default: true). Set false only for async/webhook mode.

storeResult.description: Store generated images to files table (default: true)

tools.name: generate_3d
tools.description: Generate 3D models from text or images using Tripo or Meshy. Supports text-to-3D and image-to-3D with configurable texture, polycount, and topology.

negativePrompt.description: What NOT to include in the model

artStyle.description: Art style: realistic, cartoon, etc. (Meshy only)

sync.description: Wait for completion and return result (default: true). Set false only for async/webhook mode.

storeResult.description: Store generated model to files table (default: true)

tools.name: generate_music
tools.description: Generate music with AI using ElevenLabs. Supports text-to-music with styles, lyrics, and composition plans. Up to 5 minutes duration.

prompt.description: Description of the music to generate (e.g., 'An upbeat electronic dance track with driving synths')

duration.description: Music duration in seconds (10-300, max 5 minutes)

lyrics.description: Lyrics for the song (ignored if instrumental is true)

sections.description: Composition sections for detailed control. Each section: {name, duration, styles, excludeStyles, lyrics}

storeResult.description: Store generated music to files table

tools.name: generate_speech
tools.description:
Generate speech/voiceover from text using ElevenLabs. Select a voice from list-voices (sync-voices first if empty).

Response includes: audio.url, audio.durationMs (milliseconds — divide by 1000 for seconds), audio.sizeBytes, audio.format, and voice info. Ignore the cost field — it is not accurate.

voiceId.description: Voice ID from the voices library (use list-voices to find). Preferred over providerVoiceId.

voiceName.description: Voice name to search in the library. Alternative to voiceId.

providerVoiceId.description: Direct ElevenLabs voice_id. Only use if voice is not in the library.

model.description: TTS model. eleven_multilingual_v2 (best quality, 29 langs), eleven_turbo_v2_5 (fast, 32 langs), eleven_flash_v2_5 (fastest, cheapest)

stability.description: Voice stability 0.0-1.0. Higher = more consistent, lower = more expressive. Default from voice settings.

similarityBoost.description: Voice similarity 0.0-1.0. Higher = closer to original voice. Default from voice settings.

style.description: Style exaggeration 0.0-1.0. Higher = more expressive. Default: 0.

storeResult.description: Store generated audio to files table

tools.name: list_voices
tools.description: List available voices from the voice library. If empty, run sync-voices first to populate with ElevenLabs premade voices. Returns voice ID, name, category, language, and preview URL.

search.description: Search by voice name or description

tools.name: get_job_status
tools.description: Check the status of an async AI generation job (video, image, or 3D). Returns current status, progress, and result when complete.

requestId.description: Request ID from the generation call

refresh.description: Fetch latest status from provider (for processing jobs)

tools.name: list_models
tools.description: List available AI models with pricing and capabilities. Examples: type='video' for Sora/Veo/Kling, type='image' for DALL-E/Gemini, type='speech' for ElevenLabs TTS, type='music' for ElevenLabs Music, type='3d' for Tripo/Meshy.

type.description: Filter by model type: 'video' for Sora/Veo/Kling, 'image' for DALL-E/Gemini, 'music' for ElevenLabs, '3d' for Tripo/Meshy, 'text' for LLMs, 'all' for everything

provider.description: Filter by provider: openai, anthropic, google, fal, tripo, meshy

tools.name: list_generations
tools.description: List AI generations (video, image, 3D, audio) with filtering and pagination. Track generation history and costs.

provider.description: Filter by provider: openai, google, fal, tripo, meshy

tools.name: chat
tools.description: Unified AI chat supporting Anthropic Claude, OpenAI GPT, and Fireworks models. Auto-detects provider from model name.

messages.description: Array of message objects with role (user/assistant/system) and content

tools.name: create_script
tools.description: Create a new script for audio/speech generation. Write text content and (optionally) assign a voice. Call generate_script afterwards to render audio. The project is taken from the API key's scope.

content.description: The text the voice will read

voiceId.description: Voice ID from list_voices. Optional — can be assigned later via update_script.

voiceSettings.description: Optional ElevenLabs voice tweaks: stability (0-1), similarityBoost (0-1), style (0-1).

tools.name: list_scripts
tools.description: List scripts in the current project (auto-scoped by the API key). Returns id, title, content preview, voice_id, status (draft|generating|completed|failed), output_url (when audio is rendered), and metadata (word_count, audio_duration_ms, etc.).

tools.name: get_script
tools.description: Get a script by ID with full content, voice_id, voice_settings, status, output_url (audio URL when generated), and metadata (word_count, char_count, audio_duration_ms, last_generated, generation_latency_ms).

tools.name: update_script
tools.description: Update a script's title, content, voice, or settings. Only provided fields are changed. Pass voiceId: null to clear the voice assignment.

voiceId.description: New voice ID. Pass null to unassign.

voiceSettings.description: New ElevenLabs voice tweaks: stability (0-1), similarityBoost (0-1), style (0-1).

tools.name: delete_script
tools.description: Delete a script and its generated audio file (if any).

tools.name: generate_script
tools.description:
Render a script to audio (ElevenLabs TTS). Uses the script's saved voice + voiceSettings unless overridden. Updates the script row in place: status → 'generating' then 'completed' (or 'failed'), and sets output_url + file_id when done.

Response includes: audio.url, audio.durationMs (ms — divide by 1000 for seconds), audio.sizeBytes, audio.format, and voice info. Ignore the cost field — it's not accurate.

voiceId.description: Override the script's saved voice for this render only.

voiceSettings.description: Override the saved voice settings for this render only.

model.description: TTS model. eleven_multilingual_v2 (best, default), eleven_turbo_v2_5 (fast), eleven_flash_v2_5 (fastest).

tools.name: sync_voices
tools.description: Sync premade voices from ElevenLabs into the local voice library. Run this first before listing voices — it populates the library with all available ElevenLabs voices. Only needs to be done once (or periodically to pick up new voices).

category.description: Filter by voice category (optional, syncs all by default)

tools.name: clone_voice
tools.description: Clone a voice from audio samples using ElevenLabs. Provide a name, description, and base64-encoded audio files. The cloned voice is added to the library and can be used in scripts and speech generation.

credential_group.name: OmniKit
credential_group.description: One key unlocks the whole OmniKit suite. Account keys can manage many projects; project keys are scoped to one.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Account API Key
credential_fields.description: Starts with okt_acc_ — operates across every project in the account.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Project API Key
credential_fields.description: Starts with okt_ — already scoped to a single project.
